<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. Fill out what's relevant; trim what isn't.
Small targeted PRs land faster than sweeping ones. If a fix and a refactor
are tangled together, splitting them helps review and helps bisect later.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One paragraph. The "why", not just the "what". -->

## How it was tested

<!--
- `make check` (lint + format + test + offline gate) green?
- New behaviour covered by a test?
- Packaging change? `make wheel-smoke` still passes?
-->

## Does this change model outputs?

<!--
If this touches the physics, pacing, or calibration once the engine has
landed, say how you checked the numbers held up per rider and per terrain
type (not a single averaged error). If it's plumbing, docs, or tests, write
"no output impact".
-->

## Linked issues

<!-- Closes #..., Refs #... -->
